chapter_title.en: Reward of giving Sadaqah at night

text: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِیُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنِ ابْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: الصَّدَقَهُ بِاللَّیْلِ تَدْفَعُ مِیتَهَ السَّوْءِ وَ تَدْفَعُ سَبْعِینَ نَوْعاً مِنَ الْبَلَاءِ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 1. It was narrated to me by Hamzah b. Muhammad who said it was narrated to us by Ali b. Ibrahim from his father from Ibn Fadhal from Abdillah b. Sinan from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Giving Sadaqah at night keeps away unpleasant death and seventy types of calamities.”
